full_name: Standard Specification for Pressure Vessel Plates, Carbon Steel, for Moderate- and Lower-Temperature Service
scope: Covers carbon steel plates intended primarily for service in welded pressure vessels where improved notch toughness is important, for moderate and lower temperature service. Grade 70 is the highest-strength common grade.

chemical_composition.C: 0.27% max (thickness dependent, to ~0.31% for thicker plate)

mechanical_properties.notch_toughness: Good impact toughness at low temperature (down to approx -46 C when normalized/impact tested)

license_note: Composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources (MatWeb, steel producers such as SSAB), not the copyrighted ASTM document text itself.
